steps.title: Let's build a Match Pairs quiz slide!
steps.description: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to drag prompts to their correct answers — great for vocabulary, definitions, and categorisation. Keep each item short and unambiguous so every prompt has exactly one clear match. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to open a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Match Pairs slide type
steps.description: Select 'Match Pairs' from the Quiz section of the slide type picker. It turns any matching challenge into a timed, scored game.

steps.title: Write your question
steps.description: Type the matching challenge in the 'Your question' field. This appears at the top so participants know what to connect.

action.value: Match each country to its capital city
action.hint: Type your question, then click away

steps.title: Enter pair 1 — prompt
steps.description: Type the first item participants must match. Aim for 3 to 4 pairs — enough to be engaging without crowding a small screen.

steps.title: Enter pair 1 — answer
steps.description: Type the answer for this prompt. The answer column shuffles automatically on the canvas so participants cannot just copy the order.

steps.title: Add pair 2 — prompt
steps.description: Type the second prompt. Use parallel structure — if the left column uses country names, keep that format throughout.

steps.title: Add pair 2 — answer
steps.description: Type the matching answer for pair 2.

steps.title: Add pair 3 — prompt
steps.description: Add a third pair to make the game challenging and fair. Three to four pairs is the sweet spot for engagement on any screen size.

steps.title: Add pair 3 — answer
steps.description: Type the answer for pair 3. The canvas preview on the left updates in real time — three complete pairs are now visible.

steps.title: Fine-tune with Slide Settings
steps.description: Click the Slide Settings control to set the time limit and point value. Shorter time limits add urgency; higher points reward accuracy.

action.hint: Click the Slide Settings control to open settings

steps.title: Preview how participants see it
steps.description: Click Preview to see both the presenter screen and the participant's phone side by side. Watch participants join and drag each pair into place.

action.hint: Click Preview to open the preview

steps.title: This is your participant's phone
steps.description: Participants scan the code or visit the link to join. They enter a name and tap 'Join the game!' — then wait for the host to start.

previewInteractions.label: pre-submit 3 participant responses before game starts

steps.title: Participants drag pairs into place
steps.description: Once the host starts the round, each participant's screen shows the prompts and shuffled answers. They drag each answer to its matching prompt before time runs out.

previewInteractions.label: host clicks Start — game countdown begins

steps.title: Ready to go live!
steps.description: Your three pairs are set up and the experience is ready for participants. Hit 'Present' when you're ready — participants race to drag every pair into position.

steps.title: Go live with Present
steps.description: Click Present to launch the live session. Your participants will race to match every pair before the timer runs out.
